basic_details.job_title: RGNAU Professional Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Rajiv Gandhi National Aviation University (RGNAU) Professional Trainee Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website rgnau.ac.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the RGNAU Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for all posts is 30 years as on the last date of submission of the online application. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Business Management or Administration or in a relevant Management related disciplines; Degree/Diploma in Civil Engineering.
qualification.details: Professional Trainee (Management): Master's Degree in Business Management or Administration or in a relevant Management related disciplines from a recognized University or Institution. Strong knowledge of MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and presentation tools. Professional Trainee (Civil Engineering): Degree/Diploma in Civil Engineering from a recognised Polytechnic/Institute/University approved by the State Board of Technical Education or AICTE or UGC.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 20,000/- (First Year), Rs. 22,000/- (Second/Final Year if extended)
salary_details.details: Professional Trainee (Management): Rs. 20,000/- (First Year), Rs. 22,000/- (Second/Final Year if extended) Professional Trainee (Civil Engineering): Rs. 20,000/- (First Year), Rs. 22,000/- (Second/Final Year if extended)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RGNAU Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RGNAU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.rajiv_gandhi_national_aviation_universit: Rs. 20,000/- (First Year), Rs. 22,000/- (Second/Final Year if extended)
Master's Degree in Business Management or Administration or in a relevant Management related disciplines; Degree/Diploma in Civil Engineering.

content_sections.heading: RGNAU Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the RGNAU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download RGNAU Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RGNAU Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Professional Trainee (Management): Master's Degree in Business Management or Administration or in a relevant Management related disciplines from a recognized University or Institution. Strong knowledge of MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and presentation tools. Professional Trainee (Civil Engineering): Degree/Diploma in Civil Engineering from a recognised Polytechnic/Institute/University approved by the State Board of Technical Education or AICTE or UGC.

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: RGNAU Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: The maximum age limit for all posts is 30 years as on the last date of submission of the online application. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: RGNAU Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Professional Trainee (Management): Rs. 20,000/- (First Year), Rs. 22,000/- (Second/Final Year if extended) Professional Trainee (Civil Engineering): Rs. 20,000/- (First Year), Rs. 22,000/- (Second/Final Year if extended)

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Online Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RGNAU Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RGNAU to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RGNAU Professional Trainee posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Professional Trainee positions at Rajiv Gandhi National Aviation University is 17 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Professional Trainees?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Professional Trainee posts at RGNAU, with 4 for Management and 1 for Civil Engineering.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Professional Trainee (Management)?
faq.answer: For the Professional Trainee (Management) role, candidates need a Master's Degree in Business Management or Administration or a related management discipline, along with strong MS Office skills.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Professional Trainee positions?
faq.answer: The age limit for all Professional Trainee posts is a maximum of 30 years as of the application deadline.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Professional Trainee role?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 20,000/- for the first year and Rs. 22,000/- for the second/final year if the engagement is extended.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for RGNAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications for the RGNAU Professional Trainee positions must be submitted online through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening of applications followed by a test and/or interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for RGNAU Professional Trainee posts?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Professional Trainee positions?
faq.answer: The Professional Trainee positions at RGNAU are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for RGNAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
